title: 부천일신중 2학년 영어 1학기 기말 모의고사 4회
subject: 영어
passage:
의사소통기능
⦁ 외모 묘사하기
A: What does your best friend look like?
B: She is tall and has big eyes.

⦁ 성격 묘사하기
A: What is she like?
B: She is active and funny.

언어 형식
⦁ 주격 관계대명사
Some animals which live in the wild are good at camouflage.

⦁ 5형식 동사
Their special looks keep them safe from predators.

---

Topic 1 A, B: 친구와 할머니, 애완견 묘사하기
Minjin, what does your best friend look like?
My best friend Somi is tall with long curly hair.
What is she like?
She is very active and nice. She helps everyone in our class.

---

본문: Can You Spot Them?

Are you good at hide and seek? Some animals which live in the wild are very good at camouflage. You can see them in the air, on land, and in the sea. Their special looks or abilities keep them safe from predators. Let me guide you through the world of animal camouflage.

Mountain Hare

Mountain hares are like rabbits, but they are bigger and have longer legs. They are very stylish animals. Mountain hares change colors according to season. In summer, they turn gray-brown to match the rocks and grass. In winter, they turn white to camouflage themselves in the snow. Changing colors makes them nearly invisible to predators like wild dogs and eagles.

Did you know?
Mountain hares have really big feet. Thanks to them, mountain hares can hop in deep snow and escape from predators.

---

의사소통기능
⦁ 길 묻고 답하기
A: How can I get to the museum?
B: Go straight two blocks and make a left.

⦁ 소요시간 말하기
A: How long will it take to get there?
B: It will take about 15 minutes.

언어 형식
⦁ 현재 완료
I have known her since I was 10 years old.

⦁ ask/tell/want + 목적어 + to부정사
Amelia told me to try the fish and chips.

---

Topic 1 A, B: 길 묻기와 소요시간
B: Excuse me. How can I get to the post office?
G: Go straight one block. Then make a right. It will be on your left.
B: How long will it take to get there?
G: It will take only 5 minutes.

---

본문: See You in London!

I can't wait to tell you about my trip to London. The flight took 15 hours from Incheon. When I met my friend Amelia at the airport, I was so excited. I have known her since I was 10 years old. She took me to many places in London. Come with me on my amazing trip!

Beautiful Palace

We got on the famous red bus and the first stop was Buckingham Palace. The King and his family live there. We saw the King's Guard. The guards were wearing red jackets and tall black hats. We took pictures near them, but they didn't smile or move. They were like statues!

Yummy Meal

Next, we went to Camden Market. This market is known for its food from around the world. Amelia told me to try the fish and chips. I thought, "How strange! I have eaten fish many times before...

questions.question: 사람의 외모를 묘사할 때 사용하는 표현은?
questions.explanation: 'What does ... look like?'는 외모를 묘사하는 표현입니다.

questions.question: 성격을 묘사할 때 사용하는 표현은?
길을 물을 때 사용하는 기본 표현은?
questions.explanation: 'How can I get to ...?'는 길을 묻는 표현입니다.

questions.question: 소요시간을 묻는 표현은?
questions.explanation: 'How long will it take?'는 소요시간을 묻습니다.

questions.question: 길을 설명할 때 사용하는 표현이 아닌 것은?
'make a left'와 같은 의미의 표현은?
'Go straight two blocks'는 무엇을 의미하는가?
'It will take about 15 minutes'에서 시간을 표현하는 방식은?
다음 중 외모 묘사로 적절한 표현은?
questions.explanation: 'tall and thin'은 외모 묘사입니다. 나머지는 성격입니다.

questions.question: 'She has big eyes and long hair'는 무엇을 설명하는가?
'He is active and nice'는 무엇을 설명하는가?
길 안내에서 'on your left'의 의미는?
길 안내에서 'It will be on your right'는?
'Then make a right'에서 'then'의 역할은?
questions.explanation: 'then'은 시간 순서를 나타내는 부사로 '그 다음'을 의미합니다.

questions.question: 'How long will it take to get to the museum?'에 대한 답변으로 적절한 것은?
questions.explanation: 소요시간을 묻는 질문에 '약 20분 걸릴 것이다'가 적절한 답변입니다.

questions.question: 호칭이나 존댓글 없이 길을 묻는 것이 적절한 상황은?
questions.explanation: 친한 친구에게는 존댓글을 쓰지 않아도 됩니다.

questions.question: 'Excuse me'를 사용하는 이유는?
questions.explanation: 'Excuse me'는 상대방의 주의를 끌기 위한 표현입니다.

questions.question: 길을 물을 때 예의 바른 순서는?
choices: Excuse me. How can I get to...?
How can I get to...? Excuse me.
questions.explanation: 먼저 주의를 끈 후 질문하는 것이 예의입니다.

questions.question: 'Thank you for your help'는?
길 안내를 받은 후 감사할 때의 표현은?
'What does your friend look like?'라는 질문에 외모를 2가지 이상 포함한 답변을 만드세요.
questions.answer: She is tall and has long black hair. / He is short and has blue eyes. (또는 유사한 외모 묘사 2가지 이상)
questions.explanation: 외모 묘사는 최소 2가지 특징을 포함해야 합니다.

questions.question: 'What is he like?'라는 질문에 성격을 2가지 이상 포함한 답변을 만드세요.
questions.answer: He is friendly and kind. / She is smart and funny. (또는 유사한 성격 묘사 2가지 이상)
questions.explanation: 성격 묘사는 최소 2가지 특징을 포함해야 합니다.

questions.question: 'How can I get to the bank?'라는 길을 묻는 질문에 영어로 길을 안내하세요.
questions.answer: Go straight three blocks and turn left. It will be on your right. / Excuse me. Go straight two blocks. Then make a right. (또는 유사한 길 안내)

questions.question: 'How long will it take?'라는 소요시간을 묻는 질문에 3가지 다른 방식으로 답변하세요.
questions.answer: 1. It will take about 10 minutes. 2. It takes 15 minutes to walk. 3. You can get there in 5 minutes by bus.

questions.question: 의사소통 기능과 언어 형식의 관계를 설명하고 예를 드세요.
questions.answer: 의사소통 기능은 실제 대화에서 하는 행동(길 묻기, 외모 묘사 등)이고, 언어 형식은 그것을 표현하기 위한 문법(현재완료, 관계대명사 등)입니다. 예: 성격 묘사(기능) - 'is + 형용사' (형식)
questions.explanation: 기능과 형식의 관계를 이해하는 것이 중요합니다.
